mxCell.value: Lambda: import_handler - Import rows - Optional checkout - Send summary
Lambda: weekly_report - Aggregate status - Send report
Apps Script (Calls APILib) Menu: Sync sheet
Lambda: import_handler - Import rows - Optional checkout - Send summary
AWS Secrets Manager - Snipe-IT API Token - GChat Webhook URL
Lambda: weekly_report - Aggregate status - Send report
